_**Agent (gpt-5.4)**_

原因本质上是：`normalChatClient(...)` 并不会自己去读 `application.yml`，它只会从 Spring 容器里拿一个已经创建好的 `OpenAiChatModel` Bean。

你这个项目里，项目代码里明确声明了一个 `OpenAiChatModel` Bean：

```55:69:src/main/java/com/my/ai/cursor/infrastructure/ai/config/ApiServiceConfig.java
@Bean("ragCleaningChatModel")
public OpenAiChatModel ragCleaningChatModel(RestClient.Builder ollamaRestClientBuilder) {
    OpenAiApi openAiApi = OpenAiApi.builder()
        .baseUrl("https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode")
        .apiKey("sk-537fe04bb20444758dd760331a8e599b")
        .restClientBuilder(ollamaRestClientBuilder)
        .build();
    return OpenAiChatModel.builder()
        .openAiApi(openAiApi)
        .defaultOptions(
            OpenAiChatOptions.builder()
                .model("qwen2.5-7b-instruct-1m")
                .temperature(0.1)
                .build())
        .build();
}
```

而 `normalChatClient` 这里只是把注入进来的模型包了一层 `ChatClient`：

```72:76:src/main/java/com/my/ai/cursor/infrastructure/ai/config/ApiServiceConfig.java
@Bean("normalChatClient")
public ChatClient normalChatClient(OpenAiChatModel openAiChatModel) {
    return ChatClient.builder(openAiChatModel)
        .defaultSystem("你是一个友好的 AI 助手，请用中文准确回答用户的问题")
        .build();
}
```

所以它“用谁”，取决于容器里最终注册了哪个 `OpenAiChatModel`。

## 为什么不是 `application.yml` 那套
`application.yml` 里的这段：

```46:54:src/main/resources/application.yml
openai:
  # 阿里百炼 DashScope OpenAI 兼容接口（不要加 /v1，Spring AI 会自动追加）
  base-url: https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode
  api-key: XXXX
  chat:
    options:
      model: qwen-max
      temperature: 0.7
      max-tokens: 2048
```

它的作用是给 Spring AI 的“自动配置”用的。也就是只有在 Spring AI 自动帮你创建默认 `OpenAiChatModel` Bean 时，这些配置才会生效。

但你现在已经手写了一个 `OpenAiChatModel` Bean，也就是 `ragCleaningChatModel`。Spring Boot / Spring AI 的自动配置通常会遵循“用户自己定义了 Bean，就不再自动创建同类型默认 Bean”的规则。于是结果往往就是：

1. `application.yml` 本来可以生成一个默认 `OpenAiChatModel`
2. 但你手写了 `ragCleaningChatModel`
3. 自动配置退让，不再创建默认 `OpenAiChatModel`
4. 容器里可注入的 `OpenAiChatModel` 就变成你手写的这个
5. `normalChatClient(OpenAiChatModel openAiChatModel)` 最终拿到的自然也是它

所以不是参数名 `openAiChatModel` 决定了用 `application.yml`，而是容器里实际可用的 `OpenAiChatModel` Bean 决定了它注入谁。

## 你这里还有两个容易误解的点
第一，`normalChatClient` 方法参数名叫 `openAiChatModel`，这只是一个参数变量名，不代表它一定绑定 `application.yml`。

第二，`ChatClient.builder(openAiChatModel)` 不会重新读取配置文件。它只是基于“已经注入好的模型对象”创建 `ChatClient`。

## 你当前现象的直接结论
当前 `normalChatClient` 实际上大概率在使用 `ragCleaningChatModel` 的配置，也就是：

- `baseUrl = https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode`
- `apiKey = 代码里硬编码的那个`
- `model = qwen2.5-7b-instruct-1m`
- `temperature = 0.1`

而不是 `application.yml` 里的：

- `model = qwen-max`
- `temperature = 0.7`

## 如果你希望两套配置并存
思路一般是这几种：

1. 保留 Spring AI 自动配置生成默认 `OpenAiChatModel`，让 `normalChatClient` 用它。
2. 手动再定义一个单独的 `ragCleaningChatModel`，并在需要的地方用 `@Qualifier("ragCleaningChatModel")` 指定。
3. 如果你手动定义了多个 `OpenAiChatModel`，就最好显式加 `@Qualifier` 或 `@Primary`，不要依赖“猜测注入”。

另外，你这里把 `api-key` 硬编码在 `ApiServiceConfig` 里了，这会直接绕过 `application.yml`，而且有泄露风险。更稳妥的是让它从配置文件或环境变量读取。

如果你愿意，我可以继续帮你把这套 Bean 装配关系画成一张“启动时 Bean 创建流程图”，或者直接告诉你“怎么改才能让 `normalChatClient` 确实走 `application.yml` 那套配置”。

_**Agent (gpt-5.4)**_

我接着把“怎么才能让 `normalChatClient` 真正走 `application.yml`”这件事说清楚，重点是区分“自动配置出来的默认模型”和“你手写的自定义模型”。对，你现在的代码和你的本意是冲突的。

你的本意是：

- `normalChatClient` 用 `application.yml` 里 `spring.ai.openai.*` 的默认配置
- `ragCleaningChatClient` 用你手写的 `ragCleaningChatModel`

但现在实际情况是：你一旦手写了这个 `OpenAiChatModel` Bean，

```55:69:src/main/java/com/my/ai/cursor/infrastructure/ai/config/ApiServiceConfig.java
@Bean("ragCleaningChatModel")
public OpenAiChatModel ragCleaningChatModel(RestClient.Builder ollamaRestClientBuilder) {
    OpenAiApi openAiApi = OpenAiApi.builder()
        .baseUrl("https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode")
        .apiKey("sk-537fe04bb20444758dd760331a8e599b")
        .restClientBuilder(ollamaRestClientBuilder)
        .build();
    return OpenAiChatModel.builder()
        .openAiApi(openAiApi)
        .defaultOptions(
            OpenAiChatOptions.builder()
                .model("qwen2.5-7b-instruct-1m")
                .temperature(0.1)
                .build())
        .build();
}
```

Spring AI 自动根据 `application.yml` 创建默认 `OpenAiChatModel` 的机会通常就没了。于是 `normalChatClient` 这里按类型注入：

```72:76:src/main/java/com/my/ai/cursor/infrastructure/ai/config/ApiServiceConfig.java
@Bean("normalChatClient")
public ChatClient normalChatClient(OpenAiChatModel openAiChatModel) {
    return ChatClient.builder(openAiChatModel)
        .defaultSystem("你是一个友好的 AI 助手，请用中文准确回答用户的问题")
        .build();
}
```

最终拿到的就成了你手写的 `ragCleaningChatModel`。

## 为什么会这样
因为这里是“按类型注入”：

- 参数类型是 `OpenAiChatModel`
- 容器里如果只有你手写的这一个 `OpenAiChatModel`
- 那 Spring 就只能把它注进来

而 `application.yml` 本身不会直接参与这个方法调用。它只影响“自动配置阶段能不能帮你生成默认 Bean”。

换句话说：

- `application.yml` 只负责“默认 Bean 怎么创建”
- `normalChatClient(OpenAiChatModel openAiChatModel)` 只负责“拿容器里现成的 Bean”
- 你自己定义了 `OpenAiChatModel` 后，默认那个通常就不再生成了

## 你想要的正确思路
如果你想同时保留两套模型：

1. 一套默认模型，来自 `application.yml`
2. 一套专门给 RAG 清洗的自定义模型

那么不能只手写其中一个 `OpenAiChatModel`，然后还期望默认那个自动继续存在。通常要改成下面两种思路之一。

### 方案一：两个都手动定义
最稳，最清晰。

你自己显式定义：

- `normalChatModel`，参数取自 `application.yml`
- `ragCleaningChatModel`，参数写成单独配置
- `normalChatClient` 用 `@Qualifier("normalChatModel")`
- `ragCleaningChatClient` 用 `@Qualifier("ragCleaningChatModel")`

这样不会有歧义，也不依赖自动配置是否退让。

### 方案二：保留自动配置默认模型，但不要自己再声明同类型冲突 Bean
这个方案理论上更“Spring Boot 风格”，但前提是你要避开让自动配置失效。

也就是说你需要确保：

- 默认 `OpenAiChatModel` 仍然由 Spring AI 自动创建
- 你额外的 RAG 专用能力不要以会阻断自动配置的方式去声明同类型 Bean

但你现在已经是 `@Bean OpenAiChatModel` 了，这就是问题根源。

## 对你当前代码的直接判断
你现在这段代码里：

- `normalChatClient` 不会用到 `application.yml` 的 `qwen-max`
- 它实际会用到 `ragCleaningChatModel` 里的 `qwen2.5-7b-instruct-1m`
- 也会用你硬编码的 `apiKey`
- `application.yml` 里那段 OpenAI 配置在这个注入链路上基本被绕开了

## 你接下来该怎么改
如果按你的本意，我建议你直接采用“两个模型都显式定义”的方式，因为最不容易踩 Spring 自动装配的坑。

结构上就是：

1. `application.yml` 中保留默认聊天模型配置
2. 再额外加一段 `app.ai.rag-cleaning.*` 这样的自定义配置
3. 代码中分别创建两个 `OpenAiChatModel`
4. `normalChatClient` 和 `ragCleaningChatClient` 都用 `@Qualifier` 明确指定

这样你就不会再出现“明明想走默认配置，却被注入到自定义模型”的情况。

另外，`apiKey` 现在硬编码在 Java 里，这个非常不建议，最好改成配置文件或环境变量读取。

如果你愿意，我下一条可以直接给你一份“推荐的 Bean 定义方式”，包括：

- `application.yml` 应该怎么拆
- `ApiServiceConfig` 应该怎么写
- `normalChatClient` 和 `ragCleaningChatClient` 分别怎么注入

我可以按你这个项目现有风格直接给出可落地的代码示例。

_**Agent (gpt-5.4)**_

如果按你这个项目当前状态来设计，一套“符合现在 AI Agent 行业主流”的记忆系统，核心不是先上向量库，而是先把 **会话、消息、记忆、知识库** 这四类东西分开。你现在项目已经有知识库 RAG 和统一 AI 网关，但还没有真正的“Agent memory”基础设施，所以最合理的路线是：**先补齐会话层，再做分层记忆，再把记忆接到 Advisor/编排层**。

你当前最关键的现状有两个。第一，聊天接口还没有 `sessionId` / `userId`，所以系统其实只能做“单轮问答”，不能稳定挂长期记忆：

```1:4:src/main/java/com/my/ai/cursor/application/dto/ChatRequest.java
public record ChatRequest(String message) {
}
```

```26:40:src/main/java/com/my/ai/cursor/interfaces/ChatController.java
@PostMapping
public String chat(@RequestBody ChatRequest request) {
    return chatService.chat(request.message());
}

@GetMapping(value = "/stream", produces = "text/event-stream;charset=UTF-8")
public Flux<String> streamChat(@RequestParam String message) {
    return chatService.streamChat(message);
}
```

第二，`NORMAL_CHAT` 现在每次都会自动带上 `qaAdvisor`，也就是知识库检索。这样如果你以后把“记忆”也直接塞进同一个向量库，极容易和医学知识库串味：

```38:68:src/main/java/com/my/ai/cursor/infrastructure/ai/AiGatewayService.java
public String chat(AiScene scene, String userMessage) {
    return chatClientRouter.route(scene)
        .prompt()
        .user(userMessage)
        .advisors(List.of(llmLogAdvisor, qaAdvisor))
        .call()
        .content();
}

public Flux<String> streamChat(AiScene scene, String userMessage) {
    return chatClientRouter.route(scene)
        .prompt()
        .user(userMessage)
        .advisors(List.of(llmLogAdvisor, qaAdvisor))
        .stream()
        .content();
}
```

再加上你的 `qaAdvisor` 本身就是面向“医学知识片段问答”的，不是面向用户个性记忆的：

```20:38:src/main/java/com/my/ai/cursor/infrastructure/ai/config/LlmAdvisorConfig.java
@Bean("qaAdvisor")
public QuestionAnswerAdvisor questionAnswerAdvisor(VectorStoreRouter vectorStoreRouter) {
    var promptTemplate = PromptTemplate.builder()
        .renderer(StTemplateRenderer.builder().startDelimiterToken('<').endDelimiterToken('>').build()).template("""
            你是一名医学知识问答助手。请严格依据检索到的知识片段回答用户问题。
                    【用户问题】
                    <query>
                    【检索到的知识片段】
                    <question_answer_context>
                    【回答要求】
                    1. 仅依据知识片段作答，不要补充片段之外的事实或推断。
                    ...
        """).build();
    return QuestionAnswerAdvisor.builder(vectorStoreRouter.route())
        .searchRequest(SearchRequest.builder().topK(3).similarityThreshold(0.9).build())
        .promptTemplate(promptTemplate).build();
}
```

## 推荐的行业标准设计
现在主流 Agent 记忆，通常不是“一个 memory 表 + 一个 embedding”这么简单，而是分成 4 层：

1. **Working Memory**
   当前对话窗口内的短期上下文，通常是最近 N 轮消息。
   作用是让模型知道“刚刚聊了什么”。

2. **Episodic Memory**
   某次会话中发生过的重要事件、结论、任务结果、工具调用结果。
   例如“用户这次上传了某个 PDF 并问了某个问题”。

3. **Semantic Memory**
   从多轮对话中提炼出的稳定事实和偏好。
   例如“用户偏好中文回答”“用户关注心血管方向”“这个账户常用某个术语体系”。

4. **Procedural Memory**
   系统级的行为规则、Agent 策略、角色设定。
   这个你现在很多内容其实已经有雏形，比如 `defaultSystem(...)` 和医学问答 Prompt，它更像策略记忆，不属于用户记忆。

对你这个项目，最适合的是：**先落 Working + Semantic，再补 Episodic；Procedural 继续放 Prompt/Advisor 配置层**。

## 结合你项目的落地分层
建议在你现有 `interfaces -> application -> domain -> infrastructure` 结构里新增一条完整的 memory 纵向链路。

### 1. 接口层
先让聊天请求具备记忆归属能力，至少要带：

- `userId`
- `sessionId`
- `message`
- 可选 `scene`
- 可选 `memoryMode`

也就是说，后面所有记忆都必须挂到“谁”和“哪次会话”上。没有这个，长期记忆基本不可用。

### 2. 应用层
新增一组服务，而不是把逻辑继续堆到 `ChatService` 里：

- `ConversationApplicationService`
- `MemoryApplicationService`
- `MemoryExtractionService`
- `MemoryRetrievalService`

推荐编排顺序是：

1. 收到用户消息
2. 读取最近几轮消息，形成短期上下文
3. 召回该用户的长期记忆
4. 视场景决定是否再查知识库
5. 调用 `AiGatewayService`
6. 响应完成后异步抽取新记忆并落库

这一步很关键：**记忆写入最好异步，不要阻塞首 token**。你现在已经有 Disruptor 异步处理 token 成本事件，这个思路很适合复用到 memory write。

### 3. 领域层
建议把记忆对象拆开，不要只用一个万能 JSON 表。

至少有：

- `Conversation`
- `ChatMessage`
- `MemoryItem`

其中 `MemoryItem` 再用 `type` 区分：

- `PREFERENCE`
- `FACT`
- `GOAL`
- `PROFILE`
- `SESSION_SUMMARY`

这样后面做过滤、删除、审计、冲突更新会简单很多。

### 4. 基础设施层
新增：

- `ConversationRepository`
- `ChatMessageRepository`
- `MemoryRepository`
- `MemoryVectorRepository` 或复用现有向量存储适配层

如果复用现有向量库，一定要做 **物理或逻辑隔离**。这是行业里很重要的一条。

## 最符合当前行业实践的“读写路径”
### 读路径
真正发起一次回答前，建议按这个顺序拼上下文：

1. System / role prompt
2. Working memory：最近 6-12 条消息
3. Semantic memory：用户稳定偏好和事实
4. Episodic summary：最近会话摘要
5. KB RAG：只有在需要知识库时才附加
6. 用户最新问题

也就是说，你后面应该把现在“一律挂 `qaAdvisor`”改成“按场景选择 Advisor”。否则普通聊天也会强行走知识库，不太像 Agent，而更像固定 RAG Bot。

### 写路径
每次回答完成后，不要把整段对话原样存成长期记忆，而是做一层“记忆提炼”。主流做法一般是两阶段：

1. **候选抽取**
   从用户消息和助手回复里抽取候选事实/偏好/任务状态。
2. **记忆决策**
   判断是否值得写入、是否更新旧记忆、是否设置过期时间。

例如：

- “以后都用中文答复我” -> 写成长期偏好
- “我今天临时问一下发烧怎么办” -> 不一定写入长期记忆
- “我在看高血压指南” -> 可以写成近期兴趣，设置较短 TTL

这比“全量 embedding 所有消息”更符合现在成熟 Agent 系统的做法。

## 存储设计建议
对你当前系统，建议分成关系型存储 + 可选向量检索两层。

### 关系型是主存
至少需要这些表：

- `chat_session`
- `chat_message`
- `agent_memory`

`agent_memory` 里建议有这些字段概念：

- `id`
- `user_id`
- `session_id` 可空
- `memory_type`
- `content`
- `normalized_key`
- `importance`
- `confidence`
- `source_message_id`
- `status`
- `ttl_at`
- `last_accessed_at`
- `created_at`
- `updated_at`

### 向量存储是辅助索引
长期记忆是否入向量库，取决于你要不要做“语义回忆”。

如果要做，就建议：

- 给 memory 单独一套 collection / table / namespace
- 或至少在 metadata 上强制区分 `source=memory` 与 `source=kb`
- 查询时按 metadata 过滤

这一点对你项目尤其重要，因为你现在的知识库向量检索已经是固定医学语义。**记忆不能和医学知识 chunk 混检**。

## 你这个项目最适合的记忆策略
结合当前业务，我建议你采用下面这个组合，而不是一步做满：

### 第一阶段
先做“会话记忆 + 用户偏好记忆”

- 会话消息全量落库
- 每轮对话结束后生成一条 `session summary`
- 只抽取少量高价值长期记忆，比如语言偏好、专业方向、输出格式偏好

这一步性价比最高。

### 第二阶段
再做“语义长期记忆召回”

- 对 `agent_memory` 中高价值项做 embedding
- 按 `userId + memory_type + score` 检索
- 召回 3-5 条最相关长期记忆注入 Prompt

### 第三阶段
再做“任务型/工作流记忆”

比如：

- 用户上传过哪些文档
- 某个会话里已完成哪些步骤
- 某次分析任务做到哪一步

这一层更偏 Agent，而不是普通聊天机器人。

## 与当前 `QuestionAnswerAdvisor` 的兼容建议
你现在最需要避免的是“记忆系统和知识库系统互相污染”。建议这样改思路：

1. `qaAdvisor` 不要默认挂在所有 `NORMAL_CHAT`
2. 改成按场景挂载，比如：
   - 普通聊天：`memoryAdvisor + logAdvisor`
   - 知识问答：`memoryAdvisor + qaAdvisor + logAdvisor`
3. 记忆检索不要复用医学问答 Prompt
4. KB 和 Memory 最好分开检索、分开拼接，再统一进入最终 Prompt

也就是说，未来最合理的链路不是“一个万能 Advisor”，而是：

- `MessageHistoryAdvisor`
- `UserMemoryAdvisor`
- `QuestionAnswerAdvisor`
- `LlmLogAdvisor`

按场景组合。

## 行业标准里很重要、但很容易漏掉的几件事
### 1. 记忆不是越多越好
长期记忆要做筛选、去重、冲突更新、过期淘汰。否则后面 Prompt 会越来越脏。

### 2. 记忆必须可删除
用户偏好、病史倾向、个人身份信息这类内容，一定要支持删除和过期。

### 3. 记忆要有置信度
不是所有用户说过的话都是真实稳定事实。要区分“临时提到”和“可长期依赖”。

### 4. 记忆写入最好异步
你现在有 SSE，记忆提炼如果同步做，首 token 延迟会明显增加。

### 5. 知识库不是记忆
知识库回答“外部事实”，记忆回答“和这个用户相关的上下文”。这两者行业里一般是明确分开的。

## 结合你当前项目，我建议的最优实现顺序
1. 给 `ChatRequest` 和流式接口加上 `userId`、`sessionId`
2. 新增 `chat_session`、`chat_message`
3. 每轮问答先把消息持久化
4. 新增 `MemoryApplicationService`
5. 先实现“用户偏好 + 会话摘要”两类记忆
6. 将记忆召回接入 `ChatService` 编排
7. 将 `qaAdvisor` 从“默认全局”改为“按场景启用”
8. 后续再补向量化长期记忆

如果你要的是一句话结论，那就是：

**对你这个项目，最符合当前 AI Agent 行业标准的设计，不是把 memory 直接塞进现有 RAG，而是建立“会话消息层 + 长短期记忆层 + 场景化 Advisor 编排层”，并且把用户记忆与知识库检索彻底隔离。**

如果你愿意，我下一条可以直接按你现在这个项目的包结构，给你出一版“可落地的类图/包结构设计”，包括要新增哪些类、Repository、表和接口字段。

{
  "name": "memory-system-design",
  "overview": "为当前 Spring AI + MariaDB 项目设计一套可落地的记忆系统，区分短期对话记忆与长期用户记忆，并与现有知识库 RAG、AiGatewayService、MyBatis-Plus 持久化风格兼容。",
  "plan": "# AI Agent 记忆系统设计\n\n## 目标\n- 基于当前项目的现状，为聊天链路补齐 &#96;会话&#96;、&#96;消息&#96;、&#96;短期记忆&#96;、&#96;长期记忆&#96; 四层能力。\n- 短期记忆优先复用 Spring AI JDBC Memory Repository（MariaDB）；长期记忆由业务表承载，并可按需再做向量化召回。\n- 与现有聊天/RAG 架构兼容，尤其避免长期记忆与知识库 &#96;QuestionAnswerAdvisor&#96; 混检。\n\n## 当前系统锚点\n- 聊天入口当前只有 &#96;message&#96;，没有 &#96;userId/sessionId&#96;，见 [src/main/java/com/my/ai/cursor/application/dto/ChatRequest.java](src/main/java/com/my/ai/cursor/application/dto/ChatRequest.java) 和 [src/main/java/com/my/ai/cursor/interfaces/ChatController.java](src/main/java/com/my/ai/cursor/interfaces/ChatController.java)。\n- 当前普通聊天默认总是挂载 &#96;qaAdvisor&#96;，见 [src/main/java/com/my/ai/cursor/infrastructure/ai/AiGatewayService.java](src/main/java/com/my/ai/cursor/infrastructure/ai/AiGatewayService.java)。\n- 当前知识检索 Advisor 明确是“医学知识片段问答”，见 [src/main/java/com/my/ai/cursor/infrastructure/ai/config/LlmAdvisorConfig.java](src/main/java/com/my/ai/cursor/infrastructure/ai/config/LlmAdvisorConfig.java)。\n- 当前持久化风格是：&#96;domain.repository&#96; 定义接口，&#96;infrastructure.db.*&#96; 用 MyBatis-Plus 落库，Flyway 管迁移，参考 [src/main/resources/db/migration/V1__init_knowledge_tables.sql](src/main/resources/db/migration/V1__init_knowledge_tables.sql)。\n\n## 设计原则\n- 短期记忆和长期记忆必须分层：短期记忆交给 Spring AI 的 &#96;JdbcChatMemoryRepository&#96;；长期记忆由业务自己的表和仓储负责。\n- 知识库和记忆库必须隔离：知识库继续服务 &#96;QuestionAnswerAdvisor&#96;，长期记忆不要直接混入当前 KB 检索链路。\n- 先保证“可用”和“可审计”：会话主键、消息持久化、记忆来源、过期策略要先落地，再考虑复杂的自动提炼与向量召回。\n- 对 SSE 流式友好：长期记忆写入应异步化，避免阻塞首 token。\n\n## 总体架构\n&#96;&#96;&#96;mermaid\nflowchart TD\n    ChatController --\u003e ChatApplicationService\n    ChatApplicationService --\u003e ConversationService\n    ChatApplicationService --\u003e ShortTermMemoryService\n    ChatApplicationService --\u003e LongTermMemoryService\n    ChatApplicationService --\u003e RagContextService\n    ChatApplicationService --\u003e AiGatewayService\n    AiGatewayService --\u003e ChatClient\n    ShortTermMemoryService --\u003e JdbcChatMemoryRepository\n    LongTermMemoryService --\u003e MemoryRepository\n    MemoryRepository --\u003e memoryTables\n    RagContextService --\u003e KnowledgeSearchService\n    KnowledgeSearchService --\u003e vectorStore\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## 包结构设计\n在现有 &#96;application / domain / infrastructure / interfaces&#96; 分层上新增 &#96;conversation&#96; 与 &#96;memory&#96; 两条纵向能力。\n\n### 建议新增包\n- &#96;src/main/java/com/my/ai/cursor/application/dto/chat/&#96;\n- &#96;src/main/java/com/my/ai/cursor/application/dto/memory/&#96;\n- &#96;src/main/java/com/my/ai/cursor/application/service/chat/&#96;\n- &#96;src/main/java/com/my/ai/cursor/application/service/memory/&#96;\n- &#96;src/main/java/com/my/ai/cursor/application/event/&#96;\n- &#96;src/main/java/com/my/ai/cursor/domain/repository/&#96;\n- &#96;src/main/java/com/my/ai/cursor/infrastructure/db/entity/&#96;\n- &#96;src/main/java/com/my/ai/cursor/infrastructure/db/mapper/&#96;\n- &#96;src/main/java/com/my/ai/cursor/infrastructure/db/repository/&#96;\n- &#96;src/main/java/com/my/ai/cursor/infrastructure/ai/advisors/&#96;\n- &#96;src/main/java/com/my/ai/cursor/infrastructure/ai/config/&#96;\n\n## 类图设计\n&#96;&#96;&#96;mermaid\nclassDiagram\n    class ChatRequest {\n        +String userId\n        +String sessionId\n        +String message\n        +String scene\n        +Boolean enableKnowledge\n        +Boolean enableLongTermMemory\n    }\n\n    class ChatApplicationService {\n        +String chat(ChatRequest request)\n        +Flux~String~ streamChat(ChatRequest request)\n    }\n\n    class ShortTermMemoryService {\n        +List~Message~ loadRecent(String conversationId,int limit)\n        +void addUserMessage(String conversationId,String content)\n        +void addAssistantMessage(String conversationId,String content)\n    }\n\n    class LongTermMemoryService {\n        +List~MemoryItemDto~ recall(String userId,String sessionId,String query,int limit)\n        +void extractAndStore(ChatMemoryWriteCommand command)\n        +void forget(String userId,Long memoryId)\n    }\n\n    class ConversationRepository {\n        \u003c\u003cinterface\u003e\u003e\n        +Long saveSession(ChatSession session)\n        +Optional~ChatSession~ findBySessionId(String sessionId)\n        +void touchSession(String sessionId)\n    }\n\n    class MessageRepository {\n        \u003c\u003cinterface\u003e\u003e\n        +Long saveMessage(ChatMessage message)\n        +List~ChatMessage~ findRecentBySessionId(String sessionId,int limit)\n    }\n\n    class MemoryRepository {\n        \u003c\u003cinterface\u003e\u003e\n        +Long save(MemoryItem item)\n        +List~MemoryItem~ findActiveByUserId(String userId)\n        +List~MemoryItem~ searchRelevant(String userId,String query,int limit)\n        +void expire(Long id)\n    }\n\n    class JdbcChatMemoryRepository\n    class ChatSession\n    class ChatMessage\n    class MemoryItem\n\n    ChatApplicationService --\u003e ShortTermMemoryService\n    ChatApplicationService --\u003e LongTermMemoryService\n    ChatApplicationService --\u003e ConversationRepository\n    ChatApplicationService --\u003e MessageRepository\n    ShortTermMemoryService --\u003e JdbcChatMemoryRepository\n    LongTermMemoryService --\u003e MemoryRepository\n    ConversationRepository --\u003e ChatSession\n    MessageRepository --\u003e ChatMessage\n    MemoryRepository --\u003e MemoryItem\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## 短期记忆设计\n### 采用 Spring AI JDBC Memory Repository\n建议使用 Spring AI 的 JDBC Chat Memory Repository（MariaDB），让它只承担“对话窗口历史”的持久化，不承担业务长期记忆。\n\n### 职责边界\n- &#96;JdbcChatMemoryRepository&#96;：存最近若干轮消息，供 &#96;MessageChatMemoryAdvisor&#96; 或自定义短期记忆服务读取。\n- 不在这张表里存用户偏好、标签、总结、任务状态。\n- &#96;conversationId&#96; 直接复用业务 &#96;sessionId&#96;，确保业务层和 Spring AI 记忆层对齐。\n\n### 建议新增类\n- &#96;application/service/memory/ShortTermMemoryService.java&#96;\n- &#96;infrastructure/ai/config/ChatMemoryConfig.java&#96;\n- 可选：&#96;infrastructure/ai/advisors/ShortTermMemoryAdvisorFactory.java&#96;\n\n### 配置方式\n- 在 [src/main/resources/application.yml](src/main/resources/application.yml) 增加短期记忆开关与窗口大小配置，例如：\n  - &#96;app.memory.short-term.window-size&#96;\n  - &#96;app.memory.short-term.enabled&#96;\n- JDBC schema 交给 Flyway 管理，不依赖运行时隐式建表。MariaDB 可新增一份 migration 来落地 Spring AI chat memory 表。\n\n## 长期记忆设计\n### 记忆类型\n长期记忆只保存高价值、可复用、与用户相关的信息，建议分为：\n- &#96;PREFERENCE&#96;：偏好，如语言、格式、输出风格\n- &#96;PROFILE&#96;：用户稳定背景信息\n- &#96;FACT&#96;：已确认且较稳定的事实\n- &#96;GOAL&#96;：阶段性目标\n- &#96;SESSION_SUMMARY&#96;：会话摘要\n\n### 建议新增类\n#### DTO / Command\n- &#96;application/dto/chat/ChatRequest.java&#96;：扩展 &#96;userId/sessionId/scene/enableKnowledge/enableLongTermMemory&#96;\n- &#96;application/dto/chat/ChatResponse.java&#96;\n- &#96;application/dto/memory/MemoryItemDto.java&#96;\n- &#96;application/dto/memory/MemoryRecallRequest.java&#96;\n- &#96;application/dto/memory/ChatMemoryWriteCommand.java&#96;\n\n#### Application Service\n- &#96;application/service/chat/ChatApplicationService.java&#96;：统一编排短期记忆、长期记忆、知识库与 LLM 调用\n- &#96;application/service/memory/LongTermMemoryService.java&#96;\n- &#96;application/service/memory/MemoryExtractionService.java&#96;\n- &#96;application/service/memory/MemoryRecallService.java&#96;\n- &#96;application/service/memory/ConversationService.java&#96;\n\n#### Domain Repository\n- &#96;domain/repository/ConversationRepository.java&#96;\n- &#96;domain/repository/MessageRepository.java&#96;\n- &#96;domain/repository/MemoryRepository.java&#96;\n\n#### Infrastructure Entity / Mapper / Repository\n- &#96;infrastructure/db/entity/ChatSession.java&#96;\n- &#96;infrastructure/db/entity/ChatMessage.java&#96;\n- &#96;infrastructure/db/entity/AgentMemory.java&#96;\n- &#96;infrastructure/db/mapper/ChatSessionMapper.java&#96;\n- &#96;infrastructure/db/mapper/ChatMessageMapper.java&#96;\n- &#96;infrastructure/db/mapper/AgentMemoryMapper.java&#96;\n- &#96;infrastructure/db/repository/ConversationRepositoryImpl.java&#96;\n- &#96;infrastructure/db/repository/MessageRepositoryImpl.java&#96;\n- &#96;infrastructure/db/repository/MemoryRepositoryImpl.java&#96;\n\n## 数据表设计\n### 1. &#96;chat_session&#96;\n用途：承载业务会话主键，与 Spring AI &#96;conversationId&#96; 一一对应。\n\n建议字段：\n- &#96;id BIGINT PK&#96;\n- &#96;session_id VARCHAR(64) UNIQUE&#96;\n- &#96;user_id VARCHAR(64)&#96;\n- &#96;scene VARCHAR(32)&#96;\n- &#96;title VARCHAR(255)&#96;\n- &#96;status VARCHAR(32)&#96;\n- &#96;last_message_at DATETIME&#96;\n- &#96;created_at DATETIME&#96;\n- &#96;updated_at DATETIME&#96;\n\n### 2. &#96;chat_message&#96;\n用途：保存完整业务消息，支持审计、分页、追踪长期记忆来源。\n\n建议字段：\n- &#96;id BIGINT PK&#96;\n- &#96;session_id VARCHAR(64)&#96;\n- &#96;user_id VARCHAR(64)&#96;\n- &#96;role VARCHAR(16)&#96;，建议 &#96;USER/ASSISTANT/SYSTEM/TOOL&#96;\n- &#96;content LONGTEXT&#96;\n- &#96;message_index INT&#96;\n- &#96;tokens_input INT NULL&#96;\n- &#96;tokens_output INT NULL&#96;\n- &#96;trace_id VARCHAR(64) NULL&#96;\n- &#96;created_at DATETIME&#96;\n\n### 3. &#96;agent_memory&#96;\n用途：长期记忆主表。\n\n建议字段：\n- &#96;id BIGINT PK&#96;\n- &#96;user_id VARCHAR(64)&#96;\n- &#96;session_id VARCHAR(64) NULL&#96;\n- &#96;memory_type VARCHAR(32)&#96;\n- &#96;normalized_key VARCHAR(128) NULL&#96;\n- &#96;content TEXT&#96;\n- &#96;summary VARCHAR(512) NULL&#96;\n- &#96;importance DECIMAL(5,2)&#96;\n- &#96;confidence DECIMAL(5,2)&#96;\n- &#96;status VARCHAR(32)&#96;，如 &#96;ACTIVE/EXPIRED/DELETED&#96;\n- &#96;source_message_id BIGINT NULL&#96;\n- &#96;metadata_json JSON NULL&#96;\n- &#96;ttl_at DATETIME NULL&#96;\n- &#96;last_accessed_at DATETIME NULL&#96;\n- &#96;created_at DATETIME&#96;\n- &#96;updated_at DATETIME&#96;\n\n### 4. 可选：&#96;agent_memory_vector_ref&#96;\n如果后续要做长期记忆语义召回，再增加该表；如果先不做向量化，这张表可以暂缓。\n\n建议字段：\n- &#96;id BIGINT PK&#96;\n- &#96;memory_id BIGINT&#96;\n- &#96;vector_doc_id VARCHAR(64)&#96;\n- &#96;embedding_model VARCHAR(64)&#96;\n- &#96;created_at DATETIME&#96;\n\n## 接口字段设计\n### &#96;ChatRequest&#96;\n建议扩展为：\n- &#96;String userId&#96;\n- &#96;String sessionId&#96;\n- &#96;String message&#96;\n- &#96;String scene&#96;\n- &#96;Boolean enableKnowledge&#96;\n- &#96;Boolean enableLongTermMemory&#96;\n- 可选：&#96;Integer memoryWindow&#96;\n\n### 对外查询长期记忆的接口\n建议新增：\n- &#96;GET /api/memory?userId=...&#96;\n- &#96;DELETE /api/memory/{id}?userId=...&#96;\n- &#96;GET /api/chat/history?sessionId=...&#96;\n\n对应 DTO：\n- &#96;MemoryQueryRequest(userId, sessionId, type, status)&#96;\n- &#96;MemoryDeleteRequest(userId, memoryId)&#96;\n- &#96;ChatHistoryQueryRequest(sessionId, pageNo, pageSize)&#96;\n\n## 调用编排\n### 同步/流式聊天流程\n&#96;&#96;&#96;mermaid\nsequenceDiagram\n    participant Client\n    participant Controller\n    participant ChatApp\n    participant ShortMem\n    participant LongMem\n    participant RagService\n    participant LLM\n\n    Client-\u003e\u003eController: ChatRequest(userId, sessionId, message)\n    Controller-\u003e\u003eChatApp: chat/streamChat\n    ChatApp-\u003e\u003eShortMem: loadRecent(sessionId)\n    ChatApp-\u003e\u003eLongMem: recall(userId, sessionId, message)\n    ChatApp-\u003e\u003eRagService: buildContext(message) (按场景启用)\n    ChatApp-\u003e\u003eLLM: prompt(shortMem + longMem + rag + userMessage)\n    LLM--\u003e\u003eChatApp: answer/stream\n    ChatApp--\u003e\u003eController: response\n    ChatApp--\u003e\u003eShortMem: append assistant message\n    ChatApp--\u003e\u003eLongMem: async extractAndStore(...)\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## 与现有代码的整合方式\n### 1. 保留现有 &#96;AiGatewayService&#96;\n- [src/main/java/com/my/ai/cursor/infrastructure/ai/AiGatewayService.java](src/main/java/com/my/ai/cursor/infrastructure/ai/AiGatewayService.java) 继续作为统一 LLM 网关。\n- 但要把“是否挂 &#96;qaAdvisor&#96;”从固定逻辑改成按场景/参数决定。\n\n### 2. &#96;ChatService&#96; 升级为编排层\n- [src/main/java/com/my/ai/cursor/application/service/chat/ChatService.java](src/main/java/com/my/ai/cursor/application/service/chat/ChatService.java) 建议逐步演进为 &#96;ChatApplicationService&#96;。\n- 它不再只透传 &#96;message&#96;，而是负责：读取短期记忆、召回长期记忆、按需加入知识库、记录消息、异步写长期记忆。\n\n### 3. &#96;QuestionAnswerAdvisor&#96; 只用于 KB 场景\n- [src/main/java/com/my/ai/cursor/infrastructure/ai/config/LlmAdvisorConfig.java](src/main/java/com/my/ai/cursor/infrastructure/ai/config/LlmAdvisorConfig.java) 继续保留知识库 Advisor。\n- 不建议把长期记忆直接接到现有 &#96;qaAdvisor&#96; 上。\n- 后续如需 Advisor 化，可单独新增 &#96;LongTermMemoryAdvisor&#96;，只负责把召回结果拼入 Prompt，不直接复用 KB 检索 Prompt。\n\n## 分阶段落地建议\n### Phase 1：先打底\n- 扩展 &#96;ChatRequest&#96;，补齐 &#96;userId/sessionId&#96;\n- 新增 &#96;chat_session&#96;、&#96;chat_message&#96;\n- 接入 &#96;JdbcChatMemoryRepository&#96; 作为短期记忆\n- 在聊天链路中持久化消息\n\n### Phase 2：长期记忆 MVP\n- 新增 &#96;agent_memory&#96; 表\n- 实现 &#96;MemoryRepository&#96; / &#96;LongTermMemoryService&#96;\n- 先支持 &#96;PREFERENCE&#96; 和 &#96;SESSION_SUMMARY&#96; 两类记忆\n- 先做规则提取或简单 Prompt 提取，不急着上向量召回\n\n### Phase 3：长期记忆增强\n- 增加 &#96;importance/confidence/ttl&#96; 策略\n- 增加去重与冲突更新\n- 需要时新增 &#96;agent_memory_vector_ref&#96; 与语义召回\n\n## 关键约束与决策\n- &#96;JdbcChatMemoryRepository&#96; 只做短期对话历史；长期记忆不要直接塞到 Spring AI chat memory 表。\n- 业务主键用 &#96;sessionId&#96;，并作为 Spring AI &#96;conversationId&#96;。\n- MariaDB 既承载 JDBC chat memory，也承载业务记忆表；但 schema 和职责要分离。\n- 当前项目若继续走 MyBatis-Plus，长期记忆相关仓储保持与 &#96;KnowledgeRepository&#96; 相同风格，避免一部分 JDBC 模板、一部分 ORM、边界混乱。\n- 只有当长期记忆确实需要语义召回时，才考虑和现有向量系统整合；整合时必须通过 metadata 或独立表彻底隔离于 KB。\n\n## 实施优先级\n1. 会话主键和消息表\n2. Spring AI JDBC 短期记忆接入\n3. 长期记忆主表与仓储\n4. Chat 编排层改造\n5. 长期记忆抽取与召回\n6. 向量化长期记忆（可选）",
  "todos": [
    {

[Index (Spring AI Parent 1.1.3 API)](https://docs.spring.io/spring-ai/docs/1.1.3/api/index-all.html)\n\n# Spring AI MessageChatMemoryAdvisor and JdbcChatMemoryRepository\n\n## MessageChatMemoryAdvisor\n\n&#96;MessageChatMemoryAdvisor&#96; is a class that implements &#96;BaseChatMemoryAdvisor&#96; and manages chat memory by retrieving and adding messages as a collection to the prompt.[1] It provides advisor logic through &#96;before()&#96; and &#96;after()&#96; methods that execute before and after the advisor chain is called.[1]\n\n## JdbcChatMemoryRepository\n\n&#96;JdbcChatMemoryRepository&#96; is a built-in implementation that uses JDBC to store messages.[3] It provides a builder pattern for configuration with the following methods:[2]\n\n- &#96;dataSource(DataSource dataSource)&#96; - Sets the data source\n- &#96;jdbcTemplate(JdbcTemplate jdbcTemplate)&#96; - Sets the JDBC template\n- &#96;dialect(JdbcChatMemoryRepositoryDialect dialect)&#96; - Sets the database dialect\n- &#96;transactionManager(PlatformTransactionManager txManager)&#96; - Sets the transaction manager\n- &#96;build()&#96; - Builds the repository instance\n\n## Usage Context\n\nBoth components work together as part of Spring AI's chat memory system. &#96;MessageWindowChatMemory&#96; maintains a window of messages (default 20), and repositories like &#96;JdbcChatMemoryRepository&#96; handle persistent storage of those messages.[3] Spring AI auto-configures a &#96;ChatMemory&#96; bean by default, but will use &#96;JdbcChatMemoryRepository&#96; if it's already configured.[3]\n\n**Note:** The search results do not contain a complete working code example combining both components together.",

Initially, users were required to manually specify both the dialect and &#96;JdbcTemplate&#96;, but this was improved to allow the dialect to be automatically derived from the &#96;DataSource&#96;:[3]\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;java\nvar jdbc = JdbcChatMemoryRepository\n    .builder()\n    .dialect(JdbcChatMemoryRepositoryDialect.from(Objects.requireNonNull(sql.getDataSource())))\n    .jdbcTemplate(sql)\n    .build();\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## TIMESTAMP Precision Issue\nA known issue exists with MySQL/MariaDB's default TIMESTAMP precision (0 seconds), which causes message ordering problems. [Simplify chat memory advisor hierarchy and remove deprecated API · Pull Request #3121 · spring-projects/spring-ai](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/pull/3121)\n\n# MessageChatMemoryAdvisor and Conversation ID in Spring AI\n\n## Conversation ID Usage\n\nThe &#96;MessageChatMemoryAdvisor&#96; uses a conversation ID to organize and retrieve chat messages. Historically, the conversation ID was passed via advisor parameters using the constant &#96;CHAT_MEMORY_CONVERSATION_ID_KEY&#96; (or &#96;CONVERSATION_ID&#96; in newer versions).[4]\n\n**Previous approach:**\n&#96;&#96;&#96;java\nimport static org.springframework.ai.chat.client.advisor.AbstractChatMemoryAdvisor.CHAT_MEMORY_CONVERSATION_ID_KEY;\n\nthis.chatClient.prompt()\n        .user(userMessageContent)\n        .advisors(a -\u003e a.param(CHAT_MEMORY_CONVERSATION_ID_KEY, chatId))\n        .stream().content();\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n**Modern approach with ChatMemoryAdvisorOptions:**\n&#96;&#96;&#96;java\nChatMemoryAdvisorOptions options = ChatMemoryAdvisorOptions.builder()\n        .conversationId(chatId)\n        .build();\n\nthis.chatClient.prompt()\n        .user(userMessageContent)\n        .advisors(options::applyTo)\n        .stream().content();\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## Recent Improvements\n\nA recent feature request proposes adding a &#96;conversationIdSupplier&#96; to &#96;MessageChatMemoryAdvisor&#96; to allow dynamic conversation ID resolution without manual parameter passing for each request.[2] This would enable usage like:\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;java\nMessageChatMemoryAdvisor.builder(chatMemory)\n        .conversationIdSupplier(conversationIdHolder::get)\n        .build();\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\nThe API was refactored in recent commits, with &#96;CHAT_MEMORY_CONVERSATION_ID_KEY&#96; renamed to &#96;CONVERSATION_ID&#96; and moved to the &#96;ChatMemory&#96; interface.[4]",

[Chat Memory :: Spring AI Reference](https://docs.spring.io/spring-ai/reference/2.0/api/chat-memory.html)\n\n# MessageWindowChatMemory Builder in Spring AI\n\n&#96;MessageWindowChatMemory&#96; is a chat memory implementation that maintains a message window of a specified size.[1] It ensures the total number of messages does not exceed the specified limit, with older messages being evicted when the limit is exceeded.[1]\n\n## Builder Methods\n\nThe &#96;MessageWindowChatMemory.Builder&#96; class provides the following configuration methods:[2]\n\n- **&#96;maxMessages(int maxMessages)&#96;** - Sets the maximum number of messages to retain in the window\n- **&#96;chatMemoryRepository(ChatMemoryRepository chatMemoryRepository)&#96;** - Sets the repository for storing messages\n\n## Usage Example\n\nTo create a &#96;MessageWindowChatMemory&#96; instance:[3][4]\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;java\nMessageWindowChatMemory memory = MessageWindowChatMemory.builder()\n    .maxMessages(10)\n    .build();\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\nThe default window size is 20 messages.[3][4]\n\n## Special Message Handling\n\nSystem messages are treated specially: if a new &#96;SystemMessage&#96; is added, all previous &#96;SystemMessage&#96; instances are removed from memory. When the total number of messages exceeds the limit, system messages are preserved while other message types are evicted.[1]",

[Index of /spring-ai/docs/current/api/org/springframework/ai/chat/memory/class-use](https://docs.spring.io/spring-ai/docs/current/api/org/springframework/ai/chat/memory/class-use/)\n\n# Spring AI ChatMemory Interface\n\nThe &#96;ChatMemory&#96; interface is the contract for storing and managing chat conversation memory in Spring AI.[1]\n\n## Key Methods\n\n**add()** - Two overloaded methods to save messages:[1]\n- &#96;void add(String conversationId, Message message)&#96; - saves a single message\n- &#96;void add(String conversationId, List\u003cMessage\u003e messages)&#96; - saves multiple messages\n\n**get()** - Retrieves messages:[1]\n- &#96;List\u003cMessage\u003e get(String conversationId)&#96; - returns all messages for a specified conversation\n\n**clear()** - Removes all messages for a conversation:[1]\n- &#96;void clear(String conversationId)&#96;\n\n## Key Fields\n\nThe interface defines two constant fields:[1]\n- &#96;CONVERSATION_ID&#96; - The key to retrieve the chat memory conversation id from the context\n- &#96;DEFAULT_CONVERSATION_ID&#96; - The default conversation identifier\n\n## Implementation\n\n&#96;MessageWindowChatMemory&#96; is the built-in implementation that maintains a window of messages up to a specified maximum size, removing older messages while preserving system messages. The default window size is 20 messages.[2]\n\n## Purpose\n\n&#96;ChatMemory&#96; manages chat memory (contextually relevant information) rather than complete chat history, allowing you to store and retrieve messages relevant to current conversation context across multiple interactions with stateless LLMs.[2]",

{
  "markdown": "Chat Memory :: Spring AI Reference\n\n# Chat Memory\n\nLarge language models (LLMs) are stateless, meaning they do not retain information about previous interactions. This can be a limitation when you want to maintain context or state across multiple interactions. To address this, Spring AI provides chat memory features that allow you to store and retrieve information across multiple interactions with the LLM.\n\nThe&#96;ChatMemory&#96; abstraction allows you to implement various types of memory to support different use cases. The underlying storage of the messages is handled by the&#96;ChatMemoryRepository&#96;, whose sole responsibility is to store and retrieve messages. It’s up to the&#96;ChatMemory&#96; implementation to decide which messages to keep and when to remove them. Examples of strategies could include keeping the last N messages, keeping messages for a certain time period, or keeping messages up to a certain token limit.\n\nBefore choosing a memory type, it’s essential to understand the difference between chat memory and chat history.\n\nChat Memory. The information that a large-language model retains and uses to maintain contextual awareness throughout a conversation.\n\nChat History. The entire conversation history, including all messages exchanged between the user and the model.\n\nThe&#96;ChatMemory&#96; abstraction is designed to manage the chat memory. It allows you to store and retrieve messages that are relevant to the current conversation context. However, it is not the best fit for storing the chat history. If you need to maintain a complete record of all the messages exchanged, you should consider using a different approach, such as relying on Spring Data for efficient storage and retrieval of the complete chat history.\n\n## Quick Start\n\nSpring AI auto-configures a&#96;ChatMemory&#96; bean that you can use directly in your application. By default, it uses an in-memory repository to store messages (&#96;InMemoryChatMemoryRepository&#96;) and a&#96;MessageWindowChatMemory&#96; implementation to manage the conversation history. If a different repository is already configured (e.g., Cassandra, JDBC, or Neo4j), Spring AI will use that instead.\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n@Autowired\nChatMemory chatMemory;\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\nThe following sections will describe further the different memory types and repositories available in Spring AI.\n\n## Memory Types\n\nThe&#96;ChatMemory&#96; abstraction allows you to implement various types of memory to suit different use cases. The choice of memory type can significantly impact the performance and behavior of your application. This section describes the built-in memory types provided by Spring AI and their characteristics.\n\n### Message Window Chat Memory\n\n&#96;MessageWindowChatMemory&#96; maintains a window of messages up to a specified maximum size. When the number of messages exceeds the maximum, older messages are removed while preserving system messages. The default window size is 20 messages.\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nMessageWindowChatMemory memory = MessageWindowChatMemory.builder()\n    .maxMessages(10)\n    .build();\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\nThis is the default message type used by Spring AI to auto-configure a&#96;ChatMemory&#96; bean.\n\n## Memory Storage\n\nSpring AI offers the&#96;ChatMemoryRepository&#96; abstraction for storing chat memory. This section describes the built-in repositories provided by Spring AI and how to use them, but you can also implement your own repository if needed.\n\n### In-Memory Repository\n\n&#96;InMemoryChatMemoryRepository&#96; stores messages in memory using a&#96;ConcurrentHashMap&#96;.\n\nBy default, if no other repository is already configured, Spring AI auto-configures a&#96;ChatMemoryRepository&#96; bean of type&#96;InMemoryChatMemoryRepository&#96; that you can use directly in your application.\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n@Autowired\nChatMemoryRepository chatMemoryRepository;\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\nIf you’d rather create the&#96;InMemoryChatMemoryRepository&#96; manually, you can do so as follows:\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nChatMemoryRepository repository = new InMemoryChatMemoryRepository();\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### JdbcChatMemoryRepository\n\n&#96;JdbcChatMemoryRepository&#96; is a built-in implementation that uses JDBC to store messages in a relational database. It supports multiple databases out-of-the-box and is suitable for applications that require persistent storage of chat memory.\n\nMessages are retrieved in ascending timestamp order (oldest-to-newest), which is the expected format for LLM conversation history.\n\nFirst, add the following dependency to your project:\n\nMaven\n\nGradle\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\u003cdependency\u003e\n    \u003cgroupId\u003eorg.springframework.ai\u003c/groupId\u003e\n    \u003cartifactId\u003espring-ai-starter-model-chat-memory-repository-jdbc\u003c/artifactId\u003e\n\u003c/dependency\u003e\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\ndependencies {\n    implementation 'org.springframework.ai:spring-ai-starter-model-chat-memory-repository-jdbc'\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\nSpring AI provides auto-configuration for the&#96;JdbcChatMemoryRepository&#96;, that you can use directly in your application.\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n@Autowired\nJdbcChatMemoryRepository chatMemoryRepository;\n\nChatMemory chatMemory = MessageWindowChatMemory.builder()\n    .chatMemoryRepository(chatMemoryRepository)\n    .maxMessages(10)\n    .build();\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\nIf you’d rather create the&#96;JdbcChatMemoryRepository&#96; manually, you can do so by providing a&#96;JdbcTemplate&#96; instance and a&#96;JdbcChatMemoryRepositoryDialect&#96;:\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nChatMemoryRepository chatMemoryRepository = JdbcChatMemoryRepository.builder()\n    .jdbcTemplate(jdbcTemplate)\n    .dialect(new PostgresChatMemoryRepositoryDialect())\n    .build();\n\nChatMemory chatMemory = MessageWindowChatMemory.builder()\n    .chatMemoryRepository(chatMemoryRepository)\n    .maxMessages(10)\n    .build();\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n#### Supported Databases and Dialect Abstraction\n\nSpring AI supports multiple relational databases via a dialect abstraction. The following databases are supported out-of-the-box:\n\nPostgreSQL\n\nMySQL / MariaDB\n\nSQL Server\n\nHSQLDB\n\nOracle Database\n\nThe correct dialect can be auto-detected from the JDBC URL when using&#96;JdbcChatMemoryRepositoryDialect.from(DataSource)&#96;. You can extend support for other databases by implementing the&#96;JdbcChatMemoryRepositoryDialect&#96; interface.\n\n#### Configuration Properties\n\nProperty\n\nDescription\n\nDefault Value\n\n&#96;spring.ai.chat.memory.repository.jdbc.initialize-schema&#96;\n\nControls when to initialize the schema. Values:&#96;embedded&#96;(default),&#96;always&#96;,&#96;never&#96;.\n\n&#96;embedded&#96;\n\n&#96;spring.ai.chat.memory.repository.jdbc.schema&#96;\n\nLocation of the schema script to use for initialization. Supports&#96;classpath:&#96; URLs and platform placeholders.\n\n&#96;classpath:org/springframework/ai/chat/memory/repository/jdbc/schema-@@platform@@.sql&#96;\n\n&#96;spring.ai.chat.memory.repository.jdbc.platform&#96;\n\nPlatform to use in initialization scripts if the @@platform@@ placeholder is used.\n\nauto-detected\n\n#### Schema Initialization\n\nThe auto-configuration will automatically create the&#96;SPRING_AI_CHAT_MEMORY&#96; table on startup, using a vendor-specific SQL script for your database. By default, schema initialization runs only for embedded databases (H2, HSQL, Derby, etc.).\n\nYou can control schema initialization using the&#96;spring.ai.chat.memory.repository.jdbc.initialize-schema&#96; property:\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nspring.ai.chat.memory.repository.jdbc.initialize-schema=embedded # Only for embedded DBs (default)\nspring.ai.chat.memory.repository.jdbc.initialize-schema=always   # Always initialize\nspring.ai.chat.memory.repository.jdbc.initialize-schema=never    # Never initialize (useful with Flyway/Liquibase)\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\nTo override the schema script location, use:\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nspring.ai.chat.memory.repository.jdbc.schema=classpath:/custom/path/schema-mysql.sql\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n#### Extending Dialects\n\nTo add support for a new database, implement the&#96;JdbcChatMemoryRepositoryDialect&#96; interface and provide SQL for selecting, inserting, and deleting messages. You can then pass your custom dialect to the repository builder.\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nChatMemoryRepository chatMemoryRepository = JdbcChatMemoryRepository.builder()\n    .jdbcTemplate(jdbcTemplate)\n    .dialect(new MyCustomDbDialect())\n    .build();\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### CassandraChatMemoryRepository\n\n&#96;CassandraChatMemoryRepository&#96; uses Apache Cassandra to store messages. It is suitable for applications that require persistent storage of chat memory, especially for availability, durability, scale, and when taking advantage of time-to-live (TTL) feature.\n\n&#96;CassandraChatMemoryRepository&#96; has a time-series schema, keeping record of all past chat windows, valuable for governance and auditing. Setting time-to-live to some value, for example three years, is recommended.\n\nMessages are retrieved in ascending timestamp order (oldest-to-newest), which is the expected format for LLM conversation history.\n\nTo use&#96;CassandraChatMemoryRepository&#96; first, add the dependency to your project:\n\nMaven\n\nGradle\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\u003cdependency\u003e\n    \u003cgroupId\u003eorg.springframework.ai\u003c/groupId\u003e\n    \u003cartifactId\u003espring-ai-starter-model-chat-memory-repository-cassandra\u003c/artifactId\u003e\n\u003c/dependency\u003e\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\ndependencies {\n    implementation 'org.springframework.ai:spring-ai-starter-model-chat-memory-repository-cassandra'\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\nSpring AI provides auto-configuration for the&#96;CassandraChatMemoryRepository&#96; that you can use directly in your application.\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n@Autowired\nCassandraChatMemoryRepository chatMemoryRepository;\n\nChatMemory chatMemory = MessageWindowChatMemory.builder()\n    .chatMemoryRepository(chatMemoryRepository)\n    .maxMessages(10)\n    .build();\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\nIf you’d rather create the&#96;CassandraChatMemoryRepository&#96; manually, you can do so by providing a&#96;CassandraChatMemoryRepositoryConfig&#96; instance:\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nChatMemoryRepository chatMemoryRepository = CassandraChatMemoryRepository\n    .create(CassandraChatMemoryRepositoryConfig.builder().withCqlSession(cqlSession));\n\nChatMemory chatMemory = MessageWindowChatMemory.builder()\n    .chatMemoryRepository(chatMemoryRepository)\n    .maxMessages(10)\n    .build();\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n#### Configuration Properties\n\nProperty\n\nDescription\n\nDefault Value\n\n&#96;spring.cassandra.contactPoints&#96;\n\nHost(s) to initiate cluster discovery\n\n&#96;127.0.0.1&#96;\n\n&#96;spring.cassandra.port&#96;\n\nCassandra native protocol port to connect to\n\n&#96;9042&#96;\n\n&#96;spring.cassandra.localDatacenter&#96;\n\nCassandra datacenter to connect to\n\n&#96;datacenter1&#96;\n\n&#96;spring.ai.chat.memory.cassandra.time-to-live&#96;\n\nTime to live (TTL) for messages written in Cassandra\n\n&#96;spring.ai.chat.memory.cassandra.keyspace&#96;\n\nCassandra keyspace\n\n&#96;springframework&#96;\n\n&#96;spring.ai.chat.memory.cassandra.messages-column&#96;\n\nCassandra column name for messages\n\n&#96;springframework&#96;\n\n&#96;spring.ai.chat.memory.cassandra.table&#96;\n\nCassandra table\n\n&#96;ai_chat_memory&#96;\n\n&#96;spring.ai.chat.memory.cassandra.initialize-schema&#96;\n\nWhether to initialize the schema on startup.\n\n&#96;true&#96;\n\n#### Schema Initialization\n\nThe auto-configuration will automatically create the&#96;ai_chat_memory&#96; table.\n\nYou can disable the schema initialization by setting the property&#96;spring.ai.chat.memory.repository.cassandra.initialize-schema&#96; to&#96;false&#96;.\n\n### Neo4j ChatMemoryRepository\n\n&#96;Neo4jChatMemoryRepository&#96; is a built-in implementation that uses Neo4j to store chat messages as nodes and relationships in a property graph database. It is suitable for applications that want to leverage Neo4j’s graph capabilities for chat memory persistence.\n\nMessages are retrieved in ascending message index order (oldest-to-newest), which is the expected format for LLM conversation history.\n\nFirst, add the following dependency to your project:\n\nMaven\n\nGradle\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\u003cdependency\u003e\n    \u003cgroupId\u003eorg.springframework.ai\u003c/groupId\u003e\n    \u003cartifactId\u003espring-ai-starter-model-chat-memory-repository-neo4j\u003c/artifactId\u003e\n\u003c/dependency\u003e\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\ndependencies {\n    implementation 'org.springframework.ai:spring-ai-starter-model-chat-memory-repository-neo4j'\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\nSpring AI provides auto-configuration for the&#96;Neo4jChatMemoryRepository&#96;, which you can use directly in your application.\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n@Autowired\nNeo4jChatMemoryRepository chatMemoryRepository;\n\nChatMemory chatMemory = MessageWindowChatMemory.builder()\n    .chatMemoryRepository(chatMemoryRepository)\n    .maxMessages(10)\n    .build();\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\nIf you’d rather create the&#96;Neo4jChatMemoryRepository&#96; manually, you can do so by providing a Neo4j&#96;Driver&#96; instance:\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nChatMemoryRepository chatMemoryRepository = Neo4jChatMemoryRepository.builder()\n    .driver(driver)\n    .build();\n\nChatMemory chatMemory = MessageWindowChatMemory.builder()\n    .chatMemoryRepository(chatMemoryRepository)\n    .maxMessages(10)\n    .build();\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n#### Configuration Properties\n\nProperty\n\nDescription\n\nDefault Value\n\n&#96;spring.ai.chat.memory.repository.neo4j.sessionLabel&#96;\n\nThe label for the nodes that store conversation sessions\n\n&#96;Session&#96;\n\n&#96;spring.ai.chat.memory.repository.neo4j.messageLabel&#96;\n\nThe label for the nodes that store messages\n\n&#96;Message&#96;\n\n&#96;spring.ai.chat.memory.repository.neo4j.toolCallLabel&#96;\n\nThe label for nodes that store tool calls (e.g. in Assistant Messages)\n\n&#96;ToolCall&#96;\n\n&#96;spring.ai.chat.memory.repository.neo4j.metadataLabel&#96;\n\nThe label for nodes that store message metadata\n\n&#96;Metadata&#96;\n\n&#96;spring.ai.chat.memory.repository.neo4j.toolResponseLabel&#96;\n\nThe label for the nodes that store tool responses\n\n&#96;ToolResponse&#96;\n\n&#96;spring.ai.chat.memory.repository.neo4j.mediaLabel&#96;\n\nThe label for the nodes that store media associated with a message\n\n&#96;Media&#96;\n\n#### Index Initialization\n\nThe Neo4j repository will automatically ensure that indexes are created for conversation IDs and message indices to optimize performance. If you use custom labels, indexes will be created for those labels as well. No schema initialization is required, but you should ensure your Neo4j instance is accessible to your application.\n\n### CosmosDBChatMemoryRepository\n\n&#96;CosmosDBChatMemoryRepository&#96; is a built-in implementation that uses Azure Cosmos DB NoSQL API to store messages. It is suitable for applications that require a globally distributed, highly scalable document database for chat memory persistence. The repository uses the conversation ID as the partition key to ensure efficient data distribution and fast retrieval.\n\nMessages are retrieved in ascending timestamp order (oldest-to-newest), which is the expected format for LLM conversation history.\n\nFirst, add the following dependency to your project:\n\nMaven\n\nGradle\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\u003cdependency\u003e\n    \u003cgroupId\u003eorg.springframework.ai\u003c/groupId\u003e\n    \u003cartifactId\u003espring-ai-starter-model-chat-memory-repository-cosmos-db\u003c/artifactId\u003e\n\u003c/dependency\u003e\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\ndependencies {\n    implementation 'org.springframework.ai:spring-ai-starter-model-chat-memory-repository-cosmos-db'\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\nSpring AI provides auto-configuration for the&#96;CosmosDBChatMemoryRepository&#96;, which you can use directly in your application.\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n@Autowired\nCosmosDBChatMemoryRepository chatMemoryRepository;\n\nChatMemory chatMemory = MessageWindowChatMemory.builder()\n    .chatMemoryRepository(chatMemoryRepository)\n    .maxMessages(10)\n    .build();\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\nIf you’d rather create the&#96;CosmosDBChatMemoryRepository&#96; manually, you can do so by providing a&#96;CosmosDBChatMemoryRepositoryConfig&#96; instance:\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nChatMemoryRepository chatMemoryRepository = CosmosDBChatMemoryRepository\n    .create(CosmosDBChatMemoryRepositoryConfig.builder()\n        .withCosmosClient(cosmosAsyncClient)\n        .withDatabaseName(\"chat-memory-db\")\n        .withContainerName(\"conversations\")\n        .build());\n\nChatMemory chatMemory = MessageWindowChatMemory.builder()\n    .chatMemoryRepository(chatMemoryRepository)\n    .maxMessages(10)\n    .build();\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n#### Configuration Properties\n\nProperty\n\nDescription\n\nDefault Value\n\n&#96;spring.ai.chat.memory.repository.cosmosdb.endpoint&#96;\n\nAzure Cosmos DB endpoint URI. Required for auto-configuration.\n\n&#96;spring.ai.chat.memory.repository.cosmosdb.key&#96;\n\nAzure Cosmos DB primary or secondary key. If not provided, Azure Identity authentication will be used.\n\n&#96;spring.ai.chat.memory.repository.cosmosdb.connection-mode&#96;\n\nConnection mode for Cosmos DB client (&#96;direct&#96; or&#96;gateway&#96;).\n\n&#96;gateway&#96;\n\n&#96;spring.ai.chat.memory.repository.cosmosdb.database-name&#96;\n\nName of the Cosmos DB database.\n\n&#96;SpringAIChatMemory&#96;\n\n&#96;spring.ai.chat.memory.repository.cosmosdb.container-name&#96;\n\nName of the Cosmos DB container.\n\n&#96;ChatMemory&#96;\n\n&#96;spring.ai.chat.memory.repository.cosmosdb.partition-key-path&#96;\n\nPartition key path for the container.\n\n&#96;/conversationId&#96;\n\n#### Authentication\n\nThe Cosmos DB Chat Memory Repository supports two authentication methods:\n\nKey-based authentication: Provide the&#96;spring.ai.chat.memory.repository.cosmosdb.key&#96; property with your Cosmos DB primary or secondary key.\n\nAzure Identity authentication: When no key is provided, the repository uses Azure Identity (&#96;DefaultAzureCredential&#96;) to authenticate with managed identity, service principal, or other Azure credential sources.\n\n#### Schema Initialization\n\nThe auto-configuration will automatically create the specified database and container if they don’t exist. The container is configured with the conversation ID as the partition key (&#96;/conversationId&#96;) to ensure optimal performance for chat memory operations. No manual schema setup is required.\n\nYou can customize the database and container names using the configuration properties mentioned above.\n\n### MongoChatMemoryRepository\n\n&#96;MongoChatMemoryRepository&#96; is a built-in implementation that uses MongoDB to store messages. It is suitable for applications that require a flexible, document-oriented database for chat memory persistence.\n\nMessages are retrieved in ascending timestamp order (oldest-to-newest), which is the expected format for LLM conversation history. This ordering is consistent across all chat memory repository implementations.\n\nFirst, add the following dependency to your project:\n\nMaven\n\nGradle\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\u003cdependency\u003e\n    \u003cgroupId\u003eorg.springframework.ai\u003c/groupId\u003e\n    \u003cartifactId\u003espring-ai-starter-model-chat-memory-repository-mongodb\u003c/artifactId\u003e\n\u003c/dependency\u003e\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\ndependencies {\n    implementation 'org.springframework.ai:spring-ai-starter-model-chat-memory-repository-mongodb'\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\nSpring AI provides auto-configuration for the&#96;MongoChatMemoryRepository&#96;, which you can use directly in your application.\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n@Autowired\nMongoChatMemoryRepository chatMemoryRepository;\n\nChatMemory chatMemory = MessageWindowChatMemory.builder()\n    .chatMemoryRepository(chatMemoryRepository)\n    .maxMessages(10)\n    .build();\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\nIf you’d rather create the&#96;MongoChatMemoryRepository&#96; manually, you can do so by providing a&#96;MongoTemplate&#96; instance:\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nChatMemoryRepository chatMemoryRepository = MongoChatMemoryRepository.builder()\n    .mongoTemplate(mongoTemplate)\n    .build();\n\nChatMemory chatMemory = MessageWindowChatMemory.builder()\n    .chatMemoryRepository(chatMemoryRepository)\n    .maxMessages(10)\n    .build();\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n#### Configuration Properties\n\nProperty\n\nDescription\n\nDefault Value\n\n&#96;spring.ai.chat.memory.repository.mongo.create-indices&#96;\n\nShould indices be created or recreated automatically on startup. Note: Changing the * TTL value will drop the TTL index and recreate it\n\n&#96;false&#96;\n\n&#96;spring.ai.chat.memory.repository.mongo.ttl&#96;\n\nTime to live (TTL) for messages written in MongoDB, in seconds. If not set, messages will be stored indefinitely.\n\n&#96;0&#96;\n\n#### Collection Initialization\n\nThe auto-configuration will automatically create the&#96;ai_chat_memory&#96; collection on startup if it does not already exist.\n\n## Memory in Chat Client\n\nWhen using the ChatClient API, you can provide a&#96;ChatMemory&#96; implementation to maintain conversation context across multiple interactions.\n\nSpring AI provides a few built-in Advisors that you can use to configure the memory behavior of the&#96;ChatClient&#96;, based on your needs.\n\n| Currently, the intermediate messages exchanged with a large-language model when performing tool calls are not stored in the memory. This is a limitation of the current implementation and will be addressed in future releases. If you need to store these messages, refer to the instructions for the [User Controlled Tool Execution](https://docs.spring.io/spring-ai/reference/api/tools.html#_user_controlled_tool_execution). |\n| --- |\n\n&#96;MessageChatMemoryAdvisor&#96;. This advisor manages the conversation memory using the provided&#96;ChatMemory&#96; implementation. On each interaction, it retrieves the conversation history from the memory and includes it in the prompt as a collection of messages.\n\n&#96;PromptChatMemoryAdvisor&#96;. This advisor manages the conversation memory using the provided&#96;ChatMemory&#96; implementation. On each interaction, it retrieves the conversation history from the memory and appends it to the system prompt as plain text.\n\n&#96;VectorStoreChatMemoryAdvisor&#96;. This advisor manages the conversation memory using the provided&#96;VectorStore&#96; implementation. On each interaction, it retrieves the conversation history from the vector store and appends it to the system message as plain text.\n\nFor example, if you want to use&#96;MessageWindowChatMemory&#96; with the&#96;MessageChatMemoryAdvisor&#96;, you can configure it as follows:\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nChatMemory chatMemory = MessageWindowChatMemory.builder().build();\n\nChatClient chatClient = ChatClient.builder(chatModel)\n    .defaultAdvisors(MessageChatMemoryAdvisor.builder(chatMemory).build())\n    .build();\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\nWhen performing a call to the&#96;ChatClient&#96;, the memory will be automatically managed by the&#96;MessageChatMemoryAdvisor&#96;. The conversation history will be retrieved from the memory based on the specified conversation ID:\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nString conversationId = \"007\";\n\nchatClient.prompt()\n    .user(\"Do I have license to code?\")\n    .advisors(a -\u003e a.param(ChatMemory.CONVERSATION_ID, conversationId))\n    .call()\n    .content();\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### PromptChatMemoryAdvisor\n\n#### Custom Template\n\nThe&#96;PromptChatMemoryAdvisor&#96; uses a default template to augment the system message with the retrieved conversation memory. You can customize this behavior by providing your own&#96;PromptTemplate&#96; object via the&#96;.promptTemplate()&#96; builder method.\n\n| The&#96;PromptTemplate&#96; provided here customizes how the advisor merges retrieved memory with the system message. This is distinct from configuring a&#96;TemplateRenderer&#96; on the&#96;ChatClient&#96; itself (using&#96;.templateRenderer()&#96;), which affects the rendering of the initial user/system prompt content before the advisor runs. See [ChatClient Prompt Templates](https://docs.spring.io/spring-ai/reference/api/chatclient.html#_prompt_templates) for more details on client-level template rendering. |\n| --- |\n\nThe custom&#96;PromptTemplate&#96; can use any&#96;TemplateRenderer&#96; implementation (by default, it uses&#96;StPromptTemplate&#96; based on the [StringTemplate](https://www.stringtemplate.org/) engine). The important requirement is that the template must contain the following two placeholders:\n\nan&#96;instructions&#96; placeholder to receive the original system message.\n\na&#96;memory&#96; placeholder to receive the retrieved conversation memory.\n\n### VectorStoreChatMemoryAdvisor\n\n#### Custom Template\n\nThe&#96;VectorStoreChatMemoryAdvisor&#96; uses a default template to augment the system message with the retrieved conversation memory. You can customize this behavior by providing your own&#96;PromptTemplate&#96; object via the&#96;.promptTemplate()&#96; builder method.\n\n| The&#96;PromptTemplate&#96; provided here customizes how the advisor merges retrieved memory with the system message. This is distinct from configuring a&#96;TemplateRenderer&#96; on the&#96;ChatClient&#96; itself (using&#96;.templateRenderer()&#96;), which affects the rendering of the initial user/system prompt content before the advisor runs. See [ChatClient Prompt Templates](https://docs.spring.io/spring-ai/reference/api/chatclient.html#_prompt_templates) for more details on client-level template rendering. |\n| --- |\n\nThe custom&#96;PromptTemplate&#96; can use any&#96;TemplateRenderer&#96; implementation (by default, it uses&#96;StPromptTemplate&#96; based on the [StringTemplate](https://www.stringtemplate.org/) engine). The important requirement is that the template must contain the following two placeholders:\n\nan&#96;instructions&#96; placeholder to receive the original system message.\n\na&#96;long_term_memory&#96; placeholder to receive the retrieved conversation memory.\n\n## Memory in Chat Model\n\nIf you’re working directly with a&#96;ChatModel&#96; instead of a&#96;ChatClient&#96;, you can manage the memory explicitly:\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n// Create a memory instance\nChatMemory chatMemory = MessageWindowChatMemory.builder().build();\nString conversationId = \"007\";\n\n// First interaction\nUserMessage userMessage1 = new UserMessage(\"My name is James Bond\");\nchatMemory.add(conversationId, userMessage1);\nChatResponse response1 = chatModel.call(new Prompt(chatMemory.get(conversationId)));\nchatMemory.add(conversationId, response1.getResult().getOutput());\n\n// Second interaction\nUserMessage userMessage2 = new UserMessage(\"What is my name?\");\nchatMemory.add(conversationId, userMessage2);\nChatResponse response2 = chatModel.call(new Prompt(chatMemory.get(conversationId)));\nchatMemory.add(conversationId, response2.getResult().getOutput());\n\n// The response will contain \"James Bond\"\n&#96;&#96;&#96;",

}

[Index of /spring-ai/docs/current/api/org/springframework/ai/chat/client/advisor](https://docs.spring.io/spring-ai/docs/current/api/org/springframework/ai/chat/client/advisor/)\n\n# Spring AI 2.0: ChatClient, Prompt Advisors, and MessageChatMemoryAdvisor\n\n## ChatClient Builder Overview\nThe &#96;ChatClient&#96; uses a fluent API for communicating with AI models, supporting both synchronous and streaming programming models.[1] It's created using a &#96;ChatClient.Builder&#96; object, which can be obtained through Spring Boot autoconfiguration or created programmatically.[1]\n\n## Advisors API\nSpring AI provides an Advisors API for intercepting, modifying, and enhancing AI-driven interactions. Key benefits include encapsulating recurring Generative AI patterns and transforming data sent to and from LLMs.[2]\n\n## MessageChatMemoryAdvisor Configuration\nYou can configure &#96;MessageChatMemoryAdvisor&#96; using the &#96;ChatClient.Builder&#96; with the &#96;defaultAdvisors()&#96; method:[2]\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nChatMemory chatMemory = ... // Initialize your chat memory store\n\nvar chatClient = ChatClient.builder(chatModel)\n    .defaultAdvisors(\n        MessageChatMemoryAdvisor.builder(chatMemory).build()\n    )\n    .build();\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\nAt runtime, you can set advisor parameters:[2]\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nString response = this.chatClient.prompt()\n    .advisors(advisor -\u003e advisor.param(ChatMemory.CONVERSATION_ID, conversationId))\n    .user(userText)\n    .call()\n    .content();\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\nIt's recommended to register advisors at build time using the builder's &#96;defaultAdvisors()&#96; method.[2]\n\n## Chat Memory Context\nChat memory allows LLMs (which are stateless) to retain information across multiple interactions.[3] By default, Spring AI auto-configures a &#96;ChatMemory&#96; bean using &#96;MessageWindowChatMemory&#96; with an in-memory repository.[3]",

_**Agent (gpt-5.4)**_

已按计划把记忆系统落地成可运行的第一版，核心是把短期记忆、长期记忆和知识库检索拆开了。

这次主要改了三块。第一，聊天入口升级为带 `userId`、`sessionId`、`scene`、记忆开关的新请求模型，并新增统一编排服务 `src/main/java/com/my/ai/cursor/application/service/chat/ChatApplicationService.java`，由它负责会话创建、消息落库、短期记忆加载、长期记忆召回、可选知识库上下文拼装，再调用 LLM。第二，短期记忆接入了 Spring AI JDBC Memory Repository，配置在 `src/main/java/com/my/ai/cursor/infrastructure/ai/config/ChatMemoryConfig.java`，并通过 `src/main/resources/db/migration/V3__init_chat_memory_tables.sql` 新增了 `SPRING_AI_CHAT_MEMORY` 表。第三，长期记忆补齐了完整业务层：`chat_session`、`chat_message`、`agent_memory`、`agent_memory_vector_ref` 表，以及对应的 `entity / mapper / repository / service`，同时加了 `MemoryController` 和 `/api/chat/history`、`/api/memory` 相关接口。

实现上，短期记忆现在只承担“最近几轮对话窗口”，由 `ShortTermMemoryService` 包装 `ChatMemory`；长期记忆由 `LongTermMemoryService` 管理，当前先做了一个 MVP 版本的抽取策略：会保存会话摘要，并用规则提取部分偏好记忆，比如语言和回答风格。知识库不再和长期记忆混存，聊天编排里是显式按需拼接知识上下文，`AiGatewayService` 的 `Prompt` 流式调用也改成了不再默认挂 `qaAdvisor`，避免和新记忆链路串味。

验证上，`mvn -DskipTests compile` 已通过；`mvn test` 失败，但失败点是项目原有测试基座里的 JUnit/Spring 版本不兼容，报的是 `SpringExtension` 相关 `NoSuchMethodError`，不是这次新增记忆代码导致的编译问题。

如果你要继续下一步，最自然的是这两件事：
1. 把长期记忆抽取从当前规则版升级成 LLM 提炼版。
2. 给 `agent_memory` 增加向量化召回，把长期记忆检索从 `LIKE` 升级成语义检索。

---
